productDisplayName: Puma Men Jiff II Black Sandals
description: For those who don't want the hassle of tying laces, chill out in style and revel in comfort with these funky black and red Jiff flip-flops from puma. With their textured foot-bed and strong gripped outsole, your journey in this footwear will be an assuredly awesome one.UpperSynthetic and suede criss cross straps for superior durabilityToe separator for enhanced grip and comfortTextured rubber foot-bed for enhanced gripContrast colours and puma logo on the strap for styleOutsoleTPU outsole with multi directional wave-like grooves and puma logo embossed above the heel for maxim suction, grip and traction  Flip flop careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
